title: Domain Errors, State, and Resource Lifecycles · Runtime Lens: Oop Transaction Boundaries
summary: Keep loan state transitions, storage sessions, and notification failures recoverable and observable. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop transaction boundaries increment in a stateful failure-resilient service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.
Make acquisition, commit, rollback, close, and retry responsibilities explicit across collaborating objects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
